caption: A person holds a sports trading card featuring Kirby Puckett of the Minnesota Twins, focusing on a white text area that mentions "OCTOBER 17, 1987" and "A 'UNFORGETTABLE' WORLD SERIES OPENED IN". The card is encased in a gold-bordered protective sleeve. In the background, a man with a beard wearing a dark blue t-shirt sits at a desk with a computer monitor. Behind him, a wall features a "JASPY'S" logo and "CASEBREAKS.COM" text. A second computer monitor displays a live feed of the same scene. The person holding the card tilts it slightly, causing light to reflect off the gold borders and the plastic casing. Across the sequence, the camera remains focused on the card while the man in the background remains seated at his workstation, and the overall setting remains a professional sports card breaking environment.
